title: Mod Menu (BTA Port)
description: Mod Menu port for Better than Adventure! mod for Beta 1.7.3. Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
body:
# Mod Menu - BTA Port

[![](https://jitpack.io/v/Turnip-Labs/ModMenu.svg)](https://jitpack.io/#Turnip-Labs/ModMenu)

This is a port of [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for the Beta 1.7.3 mod [Better than Adventure!](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/3106066-better-than-adventure-for-beta-1-7-3-timely) with [Babric](https://babric.github.io/). This port is based on [calmilamsy's port](https://github.com/calmilamsy/ModMenu) to Beta 1.7.3, and is thus based on a relatively old codebase. However, it does port some stuff from modern version, like the author and contributor section in the mod info that does not exist back in the original port.

![](https://i.imgur.com/BvJYJ1C.png "Mod Menu")

### User/Developer Guide

Please view the [wiki](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/ModMenu/wiki) for more info.
